summary: Good structure & types, but bash error handling lacks rigor: missing `set -euo pipefail`; grep commands grouped then piped to GITHUB_OUTPUT (line 62-66) lack `|| true` fallback. act-harness assumes specific Docker image (--pull=false) & .actrc file. Changelog merge regex (line 34) fragile for varied formats. Fixture files referenced but not provided—workflow can't run without them.
